name: Chorionic Gonadotrophin Injection IP
about: Chorionic Gonadotrophin Injection IP is a liquid injection used for treating infertility in women. Each injection contains 5000IU of the active ingredient. This injection is manufactured in India and is available for export, supply, and trade. The dosage of the injection should be taken as per the doctors recommendations. It is important to store the injection in a cool place to maintain its efficacy. This injection is effective in promoting ovulation in women and can help in the treatment of infertility.

faq.q: What is the dosage of the Chorionic Gonadotrophin Injection IP?
faq.a: Each injection contains 5000IU of the active ingredient. The dosage should be taken as per the doctors recommendations.

faq.q: What is the physical form of the injection?
faq.a: The Chorionic Gonadotrophin Injection IP comes in a liquid form.

faq.q: What is the origin of the medicine?
faq.a: This injection is manufactured in India.

faq.q: What is the storage requirement for the injection?
faq.a: The injection should be stored in a cool place to maintain its efficacy.

faq.q: What is the use of the Chorionic Gonadotrophin Injection IP?
faq.a: This injection is used for promoting ovulation in women and can help in the treatment of infertility.
